arts.ttl: Preview: Tranmere Rovers vs. Carlisle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Tranmere Rovers and Carlisle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United midfielder Guy set for more 'tests' over illness
arts.sum: Mike Williamson says Callum Guy is set for more medical tests over the illness the Carlisle United midfielder is suffering from.
